title: Dry Crunchy Indian Chicken Kebabs
description: A paleo-friendly Indian dish featuring crunchy chicken kebabs with a bitter and creamy mayonnaise sauce, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin powder, coriander powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the kebabs for 20-25 minutes, or until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Remove the kebabs from the oven and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Serve the kebabs hot with a side of mayonnaise sauce for dipping.
